promo.title: 1-Month Premium Pass
promo.text: Skip the trial limits. Get full 4K access for 30 days at a massive discount.

hero.subhead: Enjoy Sports, Movies & Live TV in 4K — Anytime, Anywhere

channelList.subtitle: Explore our dynamic channel directory with real-time updates. Find your favorite content effortlessly and stay connected to the best entertainment options available.

items.title: 8K Ultra HD Streaming
items.description: Experience breathtaking clarity. Our platform auto-optimizes your resolution for a vivid, bandwidth-friendly viewing experience.

items.title: Zero-Buffering Technology
items.description: Say goodbye to lag. Backed by premium global servers, we guarantee 99.9% uptime even during peak live events.

items.title: Massive Global Library
items.description: Unlock 15,000+ live channels across 50+ countries, plus dive into a daily-updated VOD library of box office hits and series.

items.title: Watch on Your Terms
items.description: Sync seamlessly across devices, from your Smart TV to your phone, and never miss a moment with our 14-Day Cloud DVR.

items.title: Built-In Privacy
items.description: Stream securely. Our built-in routing prevents ISP speed throttling and effortlessly bypasses restrictive geo-blocks.

items.title: 24/7 Priority Support
items.description: Skip the automated bots. Get lightning-fast support from real specialists via live chat or WhatsApp.

compatibility.title: Works on all your devices.
compatibility.subtitle: Select your device and follow the step-by-step installation guide.

guarantee.refundDesc: If you experience any buffering or aren't completely satisfied with the channel lineup, we'll refund your payment in full. No questions asked.

header.title: From browsing to streaming in 4 simple steps.

step1.title: Pick the Plan That Fits You
step1.subtitle: Flexible subscriptions — no contracts, cancel anytime.

step2.title: Confirm on WhatsApp
step2.subtitle: Send us your chosen plan and we'll set everything up for you.
step2.cardDesc: Tell us which plan you chose. We'll confirm availability and guide you through the next steps in minutes.
step2.availability: Available 7 days a week, Swedish & English support

step3.title: Complete Your Payment
step3.subtitle: Pay securely via bank transfer, cash, or online. Instant confirmation.

stripe.title: Credit / Debit Card
stripe.desc: Pay securely via Stripe link. All cards accepted.

wise.title: Wise Transfer
wise.desc: Fast international transfer with low fees. Best for EU/US.

step3.note: After paying via Stripe or Wise, please take a screenshot and send it to us via WhatsApp for instant activation.

step4.title: Get Instant Access
step4.subtitle: Receive your credentials within 15 minutes and start streaming.
step4.successDesc: Your credentials will be sent to your WhatsApp within 15 minutes.

items.title: Username & Password
items.desc: Login credentials for all your devices

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.desc: We're here if you need any help

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our IPTV service.

items.q: What is IPTV and how does it work?
items.a: IPTV delivers TV channels and video content over your internet connection instead of cable or satellite.

items.q: How many channels do I get?
items.a: You get access to thousands of live channels, movies, and series.

items.q: How do I activate my subscription?
items.a: You will receive your credentials via WhatsApp or email and can start immediately.
Usually due to slow internet. Minimum 25 Mbps recommended for 4K streaming.
Smart TVs, phones, tablets, PC, and streaming devices like Firestick or Apple TV.
Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee if you are not satisfied.

contact.title: Stay in the Loop
contact.subtitle: Join our newsletter for the latest channel updates and Swedish market offers.
